title: 01940_CollabLLM_From_Passive_Responders_to_Active_Collaborators
positive_examples: Makes AI more user- and human-centric, yielding a positive societal impact.
Increases the adoption of AI in safety-critical scenarios, such as medical decision-making tasks.
COLLABLLM seeks to clarify user intent, creating opportunities to detect misuse.
negative_examples: Concerns may arise regarding users with malevolent goals.
Malicious users might obscure their true intentions to bypass safeguards.
Potential for misuse if the AI fails to accurately identify unsafe behavior.
